A long, stiff thrusting sword built to punch through plate armor and chainmail. The estoc has no cutting edge â€” only a rigid triangular or square blade that concentrates force on a needle point.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee d6, Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee d8, Brace, Punch, Wound
MasterTwo-Handed, Finesse, Melee d8, Brace, Punch, Wound â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkIf you have not used your Attack action or held action this turn, you may make one attack with this weapon as a bonus action.
